sections.name: Requirement 1: Install and Maintain Network Access Controls
Requirement 2: Apply Secure Configurations to All System Components
Requirement 6: Develop and Maintain a Secure System
Requirement 7: Restrict Access to System Components
Requirement 10: Log and Monitor all Access to System Components
Requirement 11: Test Security Systems and Processes

controls.name: Documentation of network diagram and supporting topologies
controls.description: Current network diagram and supporting documentation of network architecture and configuration

controls.name: Prohibition of direct public access between Internet and system components
controls.description: Firewall rules prevent direct public access to payment cardholder data environment

controls.name: Security policies and procedures for firewall configuration standards
controls.description: Documented and implemented firewall rule set that describes access to networks and systems

controls.name: Inventory of system components in scope for PCI DSS
controls.description: All system components are identified and documented

controls.name: Secure configuration standards for all system components
controls.description: Configuration standards established and documented for all system components

controls.name: Disabling of unnecessary services, protocols, daemons, and functions
controls.description: Unnecessary services and processes are disabled or removed from system components

controls.name: Configuration of administrative access to system components
controls.description: System components are configured to prevent administrative access by unauthorized individuals

controls.name: Establishment of process to identify security vulnerabilities
controls.description: Process established to identify and evaluate security vulnerabilities

controls.name: Development and test environments separated from production
controls.description: Development, test, and production environments are separated

controls.name: Separation of duties in development, test, and production environments
controls.description: Separation of duties enforced between development, test, and production personnel

controls.name: Formal change control procedures for production systems
controls.description: Formal change control procedures documented and implemented for production systems

controls.name: Injection flaws are prevented or mitigated
controls.description: Injection flaws are prevented or protected against through code review and secure coding practices

controls.name: Access to system components limited to authorized personnel
controls.description: Access to system components restricted to authorized personnel

controls.name: Multi-factor authentication for all users with access
controls.description: Multi-factor authentication is implemented for all users with remote access

controls.name: Logging of access to audit trails
controls.description: User access is logged and audit trails maintain user identity, access, and account

controls.name: Protection of audit trails from unauthorized modifications
controls.description: Audit trails are protected from unauthorized modifications

controls.name: Periodic vulnerability scanning of in-scope systems
controls.description: Quarterly vulnerability scanning of systems in scope for PCI DSS

controls.name: Information security policy established and maintained
controls.description: Information security policy is established and communicated to all personnel

controls.name: Acceptable use policies established for authorized system users
controls.description: Acceptable use policy established and documented for authorized system users

controls.name: Roles and responsibilities assigned for information security
controls.description: Roles and responsibilities for security are assigned to appropriate personnel

controls.name: Personnel awareness program for information security
controls.description: Security awareness program is established to educate personnel

controls.name: Personnel training on information security is documented
controls.description: Personnel training and periodic awareness program are documented
